strategy: Institutional Learning and After-Action Implementation System
critical_function: converts crisis lessons audits near misses and public feedback into funded rule and practice changes
reduces administrative burden audits access and enforcement equity strengthens rights protection and participation
allows local adaptation experimentation scenario learning and frontline discretion with oversight
clarifies authority improves interagency coordination reduces duplication and strengthens crisis decision pathways
improves transparency public communication uncertainty explanation complaint response and institutional trust
builds staffing expertise procurement data systems field operations and implementation competence
